description_long: This is a traditional-style faucet with a high, curved gooseneck spout and a single lever handle. The body and spout are finished in a dark, oil-rubbed bronze color, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The spout arches gracefully upward and outward, providing ample clearance for filling large containers or washing. The single lever handle is mounted to the side of the base, ergonomically shaped for easy grip and operation. The base is robust and cylindrical, with subtle decorative ridges that enhance its vintage aesthetic. The faucet is designed for deck-mount installation, commonly found in kitchens or utility sinks in urban environments.
description: A dark oil-rubbed bronze gooseneck faucet with a single side lever and decorative base, featuring a high arch and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall gooseneck spout and the single lever handle on the right side of the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full curve of the spout and the absence of the handle from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle now on the left, showing the spout's arch and the cylindrical base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the spout's curve and the base, with the handle not visible.
